mainEntity.name: What if injury worsens after initial comp approval in Centerville?
mainEntity.text: What if injury worsens after initial comp approval in Centerville?

acceptedAnswer.text: File supplemental claim; new 180-day report if >1 year post-original[4].

suggestedAnswer.text: Centerville: Reopen for aggravation within 312 weeks of accident. Medical proof required. Insurers resist—track symptoms[1][4].

name: Worsening Injury After Approval Centerville
description: File supplemental claim; new 180-day report if >1 year post-original[4].
